rss:channel.rss:title: Recent Publications of Bruce Godfrey
rss:channel.rss:description: Custom RSS feed for individual faculty publications from Idaho VIVO
rss:channel.dc:title: Recent Publications of Bruce Godfrey

rss:item.rss:title: Evolving Studies of Ground Snow Loads for Several Western US States
rss:item.dc:title: Evolving Studies of Ground Snow Loads for Several Western US States
rss:item.dc:creator: Sack, Ronald
Nielsen, Richard
Godfrey, Bruce
rss:item.prism:publicationName: Evolving Studies of Ground Snow Loads for Several Western US States
rss:item.content:encoded:
Sack, Ronald; Nielsen, Richard; Godfrey, Bruce. (2017). Evolving Studies of Ground Snow Loads for Several Western US States. Journal of Structural Engineering. https://doi.org/10.1061/(ASCE)ST.1943-541X.0001679

]]

rss:item.rss:title: The USDA's NAIP Imagery in Idaho: A Decade of Evolving Partnerships to Improve Access
